mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM loan_late_payment_tbl WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} AND repayment_status = '연체' AND updated_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH)
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(balance), 0) FROM account_tbl WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN repayment_status = '납부완료' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 4) END FROM loan_interest_payment_tbl WHERE customer_id = #{customerId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO credit_score_tbl (customer_id, credit_score, credit_rank) VALUES (#{customerId}, #{creditScore}, CASE WHEN #{creditScore} >= 900 THEN 1 WHEN #{creditScore} >= 800 THEN 2 WHEN #{creditScore} >= 700 THEN 3 WHEN #{creditScore} >= 600 THEN 4 ELSE 5 END ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE credit_score = IF(credit_score != VALUES(credit_score), VALUES(credit_score), credit_score), credit_rank = IF(credit_rank != VALUES(credit_rank), VALUES(credit_rank), credit_rank);
